purpose: Controls process pressure by modulating gas flow through valve position adjustments

states.name: valve_seat_wear
states.description: Health of valve seat elastomer, 1.0 = new, 0.0 = completely worn

states.name: valve_drive_accuracy
states.description: Accuracy of valve drive level control, 1.0 = perfect accuracy, 0.0 = no control

events.name: excessive_closed_conductance
events.description: valve does not close properly allowing unwanted flow

events.name: insufficient_full_flow
events.description: unit does not achieve full flow rate

events.name: valve_malfunction
events.description: valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, or corroded

parameters.name: valve_seat_wear_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for valve seat wear degradation

parameters.name: valve_drive_accuracy_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for valve drive accuracy degradation

parameters.name: valve_usage_rate
parameters.description: Normalized valve usage intensity affecting degradation rate

parameters.name: nominal_pressure
parameters.description: Target process pressure under normal operation

parameters.name: seat_wear_threshold
parameters.description: Valve seat wear level triggering excessive closed conductance

parameters.name: drive_accuracy_threshold
parameters.description: Drive accuracy level triggering insufficient full flow

parameters.name: malfunction_threshold
parameters.description: Combined degradation level triggering valve malfunction

state_transition_logic: valve_seat_wear decreases by (valve_seat_wear / valve_seat_wear_timescale) * valve_usage_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
valve_drive_accuracy decreases by (valve_drive_accuracy / valve_drive_accuracy_timescale) * valve_usage_rate * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
event_logic: valve_malfunction occurs when min(valve_seat_wear, valve_drive_accuracy) < malfunction_threshold
assumptions: Valve degradation is primarily driven by usage cycles and time
Seat wear affects both closed-state sealing and flow capacity
Drive accuracy degradation affects valve positioning precision
Process pressure is proportional to both valve health states
No external pressure feedback control is modeled
